name: ADVANCED SEAL: RYOKUIN (ADVANCED SEAL: ENERGY SEAL)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu (Advanced Seal)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: S, F

Spend an amount of Chakra to infuse the seal and throw it at the target. If you succeed at a ranged touch attack, the seal drains an amount of Chakra from the target equal to the Chakra you infused into it. For 1d4+2 rounds, either the victim can eat the seal to regain the Chakra drained from it or you can touch the seal to absorb any Chakra drained by it and gain as much temporary HP for 1 minute. A creature with the Chakra Vampire ability can drain the seal as though it were a creature that has amount of Chakra drained.
